title: R6 supervised milestone autocycle pilot
summary: Run one bounded supervised milestone pilot from structured intake to operator decision.

lineage.rationale: The R6 milestone brief opens the supervised milestone autocycle pilot boundary.

evidence.summary: The R6 milestone brief defines the supervised pilot boundary and non-claims.

audit.notes: Fixture milestone reviewed against active R6 repo truth.

scope_summary: Run one bounded supervised milestone pilot inside AIOffice_V2 only.
objective: Propose and later freeze one operator-controlled milestone task set without opening dispatch or automation claims early.
done_criteria: One milestone proposal can be generated from one structured intake.
Later R6 tasks can freeze, baseline-bind, and audit the exact same milestone plan.
